title: BlameCraft
description: Small Modpack for myself and my friends.
body:
**_Features:_**
- Create: Unleash your inner engineer with the Create mod, which introduces complex and customizable machinery to your Minecraft world. Build intricate contraptions, automate tasks, and master the art of mechanical engineering.

- Farmer's Delight: Spices up Minecraft by supercharging farming with more crops and cooking with exciting new recipes and mechanics.

- Agricraft: Revolutionizes farming in Minecraft, allowing you to create custom, super-efficient crop fields and crossbreed plants for unique and powerful resources. Dive into a world of advanced agriculture and watch your yields grow!

---
**About This Modpack:**

BlameCraft is a meticulously crafted collection of mods designed to elevate your Minecraft experience. Immerse yourself in a world of adventure and creativity as you explore new gameplay possibilities with these carefully selected mods.

---
**Modpack Contents:**

_If you want to get any of these mods for personal use, please download them from their original pages to support their authors._
#### **Mods:**

- [Alex's Mobs by sbom_xela ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-mobs)  
- [Alex's Delight by NCP_Bails ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-delight)  
- [FramedBlocks by XFactHD ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framedblocks)  
- [Storage Drawers by Texelsaur ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/storage-drawers)  
- [Farmer's Delight by vectorwing](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- [Ding by iChun](https://modrinth.com/mod/ding)
- [Tom's Simple Storage Mod by tom5454](https://modrinth.com/mod/toms-storage)
- [AgriCraft by infinityraider](https://modrinth.com/mod/agricraft)
- [Supplementaries by MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)
- [Just Enough Items by mezz](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)
- [Another Furniture by crispytwig](https://modrinth.com/mod/another-furniture)
- [Create by simibubi](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Create Slice & Dice by possible_triangle](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice)
- [Rechiseled: Create by SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled-create)
- [Rechiseled by SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled)
- [Rubidium by Asek3](https://modrinth.com/mod/rubidium)
- [Oculus by Asek3](https://modrinth.com/mod/oculus)
- [Terralith by Stardust](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)
- [Leaves Be Gone by Fuzs](https://modrinth.com/mod/leaves-be-gone)
- [Inventory Essentials by BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-essentials)
- [Starlight (Forge) by spottedleaf](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight-forge)
- [FerriteCore by malte0811](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Yeetus Experimentus by Sunekaer](https://modrinth.com/mod/yeetus-experimentus)
- [ModernFix by embeddedt](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Lazy DataFixerUpper(LazyDFU) [FORGE] by Corgi_Taco](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/lazy-dfu-forge)
- [Crafting Tweaks by BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks)
- [Visual Workbench [Forge & Fabric] by Fuzs](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/visual-workbench)

#### **Dependencies:**

- [Citadel by sbom_xela ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/citadel)  
- [Moonlight Lib by MehVahdJukaar ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/selene)
- [SuperMartijn642's Config Lib by SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-config-lib)
- [SuperMartijn642's Core Lib by SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-core-lib/)
- [Kotlin for Forge by thedarkcolour](https://modrinth.com/mod/kotlin-for-forge)
- [Balm by BlayTheNinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm)
- [Puzzles Lib by Fuzs](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzles-lib)
- [InfinityLib by infinityraider](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinitylib)
- [Cristel Lib by Cristelknight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cristel-lib)
- [Fusion (Connected Textures) by SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures)
